nodes.x: THE word that Jeremiah the prophet spake unto Baruch the son of Neriah, when he had written these words in a book at the mouth of Jeremiah, in the fourth year of Jehoiakim the son of Josiah king of…
Neriah, when he had written these words in a book atthe inouth of Jereriah, in the fourth year of Jehoiakim the. son of “J osiah King of Judah, saying,
Thus saith the LORD, the God of Israel, unto thee, O Baruch;
4 ‘Why does thy heart trouble thee, Baruch, and why does thy thought disturb thee ?
Thou didst say, Woe is me now! for the LORD hath added grief to my sorrow; I fainted in my sighing, and I find no rest.
Thus shalt thou say unto him, The LORD saith thus; Behold, [that] which I have built will I break down, and that which I have planted I will pluck up, even this whole land.
And seekest thou great things for thyself? seek [them] not: for, behold, I will bring evil upon all flesh, saith the LORD: but thy life will I give unto thee for a prey in all places whither thou…
